attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Change the contact phone number to (555) 867-5309
attempts.studio_response_summary: Generated plan card, approved, rebuilt contact.html. Changed phone in both display text and tel: href with correct +1 prefix.
attempts.collateral_damage: Full page rebuild — HTML structure may have shifted but phone/email/form all preserved
attempts.manual_steps_taken: Had to approve plan card (plan gate blocks all layout_update edits)
attempts.gap_identified: content_update regex requires field name immediately after 'the' — 'change the CONTACT phone' has 'contact' between 'the' and 'phone' so it misclassifies as layout_update

attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Update the contact email to hello@readingsbymaria.com
attempts.studio_response_summary: Plan card generated, approved, rebuilt contact.html. Email updated in both mailto: link and display text.
attempts.gap_identified: Same content_update regex issue — 'update the contact email' has 'contact' between 'the' and 'email'

attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Change the Tarot reading 60-minute price from $125 to $145
attempts.studio_response_summary: Plan card, approved, rebuilt services.html. Changed only the 60-minute Tarot price from $125 to $145.
attempts.collateral_damage: None detected — other prices preserved correctly
attempts.gap_identified: content_update regex doesn't match 'change the Tarot reading 60-minute price' — too many words between 'the' and 'price'

attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Add business hours to the contact page: Tuesday through Saturday, 10am to 7pm. Closed Sunday and Monday.
attempts.studio_response_summary: Plan card, approved, rebuilt contact.html. Hours content added.
attempts.content_after: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-7pm, Closed Sunday-Monday (2 matches in HTML)
attempts.collateral_damage: Full page rebuild — previous edits (phone, email) preserved
attempts.gap_identified: This is legitimately layout_update (adding new content), not content_update. But the plan gate adds unnecessary friction for simple additions.

attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Change the first testimonial name from Sarah to Sandra K. and update the text to: 'Maria helped me find clarity during the most confusing time of my life. Her reading was accurate and compassionate.'
attempts.studio_response_summary: Surgical edit — updated testimonial text and attribution from '— Sarah, Chicago' to '— Sandra K.' in 28 seconds. Did NOT rebuild the whole page.
attempts.content_before: — Sarah, Chicago + long quote about patterns
attempts.content_after: — Sandra K. + 'Maria helped me find clarity...'
attempts.collateral_damage: None — surgical replacement of just the testimonial block
attempts.manual_steps_taken: None — no plan gate, direct edit executed
attempts.gap_identified: This one worked perfectly without a plan card. Inconsistency in when the plan gate fires.

attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Change all the booking buttons from whatever they say to 'Discover Your Path'
attempts.studio_response_summary: Changed CTAs on index.html only. Other 3 pages not updated.
attempts.failure_reason: Single-page edit scope — only modified the active page (index.html), not all 4 pages
attempts.content_after: Discover Your Path (index.html only), Begin Your Journey (services, about, contact still unchanged)
attempts.manual_steps_taken: Would need to switch to each page and repeat the edit 3 more times
attempts.gap_identified: No cross-page edit capability. 'All pages' requests only apply to the current page. Need a multi-page edit mode or a 'apply to all pages' flag.

attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Add a new service to the pricing section: Astrology Birth Chart Reading, 90 minutes, $195
attempts.studio_response_summary: Plan card, approved, rebuilt services.html. New service card added to the pricing grid.
attempts.content_after: 7 services listed (Astrology Birth Chart Reading $195 added)
attempts.collateral_damage: Full page rebuild — all other services preserved with correct pricing
attempts.gap_identified: Works but requires full page rebuild for a simple card addition

attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Remove the Past Life Regression service from the pricing section
attempts.studio_response_summary: Plan card, approved, rebuilt services.html. Past Life Regression removed cleanly.
attempts.collateral_damage: Full page rebuild — other services preserved
attempts.gap_identified: Same pattern — works but full rebuild for a single card removal

attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Add a banner at the top of the home page that says 'Mercury is in retrograde — book a clarity session before March 15th' with a link to the contact page
attempts.studio_response_summary: Build ran (slots registered, blueprint updated, post-processing ran) but banner content not present in final HTML.
attempts.failure_reason: Claude rebuilt the page without including the requested banner. The instruction to add a new element at the top was lost during the full page regeneration.
attempts.content_after: Still no banner — 0 matches for mercury/retrograde
attempts.collateral_damage: Page may have been partially regenerated, losing other edits
attempts.gap_identified: Adding new structural elements (banner at top) during a layout_update rebuild can fail silently — Claude regenerates the page from brief context and may not include ephemeral/seasonal content that wasn't in the original brief

attempts.instruction_sent_to_studio: Add the studio address to the contact page: 742 Crescent Moon Lane, Suite 3, Port Saint Lucie, FL 34952
attempts.studio_response_summary: Plan card, approved, rebuilt contact.html. Address added to the page.
attempts.content_after: 742 Crescent Moon Lane, Port Saint Lucie, FL 34952 (2 matches)
attempts.collateral_damage: Full page rebuild — previous edits (phone, email, hours) preserved

classifier_accuracy.note: Zero edits classified as content_update. The content_update regex requires the field name immediately after 'the' but real-world edits include location words (contact phone, Tarot reading price) between 'the' and the field name.

plan_gate_impact.note: Edit 5 (testimonial) executed directly without a plan card. All others required plan approval. The plan gate adds ~3 minutes of wait time per edit (plan generation + approval click + build).

cross_page_capability.result: FAIL — edits only apply to the active page. 'Change all buttons' only changed index.html.
cross_page_capability.recommendation: Need a multi-page edit flag or a 'for all pages' detection that iterates through spec.pages

surgical_vs_rebuild.note: Only Edit 5 (testimonial) was a surgical text replacement (28s). All others triggered full page rebuilds (120-180s each). The system lacks a deterministic text-find-and-replace path for simple content changes.

content_preservation.note: Edit 9 (banner) failed — page was regenerated without the banner. Edit 6 (CTA) was partial. All other edits preserved cumulative changes correctly.

what_content_editing_needs: 1. Content model / data layer — phone, email, hours, prices stored in spec.json as structured data, not hardcoded in HTML
2. Deterministic text replacement path — for simple 'change X to Y' requests, find the text in HTML and replace it without invoking Claude
3. Cross-page edit capability — detect 'all pages' in the request and iterate
4. Widen content_update regex — allow location words between 'the' and field names
5. Bypass plan gate for content_update and simple layout_update edits — the approval step adds 3 min overhead for a phone number change
